title: lycium carnosum
intro: Lycium carnosum, also known as the boxthorn or desert box, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Lycium carnosum include reducing oxidative stress, improving eye health, and supporting immune function, which may help to prevent or manage conditions such as cataracts, age-related macular degeneration, and autoimmune diseases. Lycium carnosum can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
